claims.name: CREAK truth Cohen's d
claims.statement: A ridge probe trained at the end-of-turn token (Gemma-3-27B, layer 32) discriminates true vs false CREAK claims at the user turn with Cohen's d under the default (neutral) persona.

claims.name: CREAK truth n true
claims.statement: Number of true CREAK claims in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user-turn framing, default persona).

claims.name: CREAK truth n false
claims.statement: Number of false CREAK claims in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (user-turn framing, default persona).

claims.name: BailBench harm Cohen's d
claims.statement: A ridge probe trained at the end-of-turn token (Gemma-3-27B, layer 39) discriminates harmful vs benign BailBench and stress-test items with Cohen's d under the default (neutral) persona; negative sign reflects the benign>harmful projection convention in the scoring pipeline.

claims.name: BailBench harm n harmful
claims.statement: Number of harmful BailBench/stress-test items in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (pooled over turn).

claims.name: BailBench harm n benign
claims.statement: Number of benign BailBench/stress-test items in the end-of-turn base discrimination panel (pooled over turn).

claims.name: Truth d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the neutral system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).

claims.name: Truth d under lie directive
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the lie_directive system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32); negative sign indicates the probe's evaluative readout has flipped.

claims.name: Truth d under pathological liar
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the pathological_liar system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L32).

claims.name: Harm d under neutral persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the neutral system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39).

claims.name: Harm d under sadist persona
claims.statement: Cohen's d for harmful vs benign separation under the sadist system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39); the distributions collapse.

claims.name: Politics d under democrat prompt
claims.statement: Cohen's d for left vs right separation under a democrat system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39).

claims.name: Politics d under republican prompt
claims.statement: Cohen's d for left vs right separation under a republican system prompt (end-of-turn probe, Gemma-3-27B L39); negative sign indicates right>left.

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth truthful
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the truthful system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth neutral
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the neutral system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth unreliable_narrator
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the unreliable_narrator system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth contrarian
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the contrarian system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth opposite_day
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the opposite_day system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth lie_directive
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the lie_directive system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth pathological_liar
claims.statement: Cohen's d for true vs false separation under the pathological_liar system prompt in the truth domain, as rendered in the full-appendix persona modulation figure (end-of-turn probe, tb-5_L32).

claims.name: Persona modulation d full truth con_artist

claims.name: Cross training d truth end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the truth domain under the end-of-turn probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d harm end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the harm domain under the end-of-turn probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d politics_democrat end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the politics_democrat domain under the end-of-turn probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d politics_republican end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the politics_republican domain under the end-of-turn probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d truth model-marker probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the truth domain under the model-marker probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d harm model-marker probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the harm domain under the model-marker probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d politics_democrat model-marker probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the politics_democrat domain under the model-marker probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d politics_republican model-marker probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the politics_republican domain under the model-marker probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d truth task-averaged probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the truth domain under the task-averaged probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d harm task-averaged probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the harm domain under the task-averaged probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d politics_democrat task-averaged probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the politics_democrat domain under the task-averaged probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: Cross training d politics_republican task-averaged probe
claims.statement: Signed Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token for the politics_republican domain under the task-averaged probe (positive = first-listed class scores higher: true / harmful / left). Rendered as a bar in the cross-training-selector appendix figure.

claims.name: CREAK truth n claims prose
claims.statement: Approximate per-class sample size quoted in sec:induced-roleplay for CREAK true vs false claims at the user turn (also the n used in the base discrimination panel).

claims.name: CREAK truth CV accuracy
claims.statement: Cross-validated classification accuracy of the end-of-turn probe on CREAK true vs false at the user turn (tb-5_L32). Quoted as ~93% in sec:induced-roleplay.

claims.name: BailBench harm n items prose
claims.statement: Approximate per-class sample size of harmful BailBench + stress-test items used in the per-turn split; quoted as ~77 items in sec:induced-roleplay.

claims.name: BailBench harm CV accuracy user
claims.statement: Cross-validated classification accuracy of the end-of-turn probe on harmful vs benign BailBench + stress-test items at the user turn (tb-5_L39). One endpoint of the 84-89% range quoted in sec:induced-roleplay.

claims.name: BailBench harm CV accuracy assistant
claims.statement: Cross-validated classification accuracy of the end-of-turn probe on harmful vs benign BailBench + stress-test items at the assistant turn (tb-5_L39). Other endpoint of the 84-89% range quoted in sec:induced-roleplay.

claims.name: Per turn parent absolute d truth user
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for the task-averaged parent probe on the truth domain at the user turn; drawn as the horizontal dashed reference line in the per-turn appendix figure. Value carried over as a hard-coded parent-run summary in the producer (see headline_table.csv parent rows).

claims.name: Per turn parent absolute d truth assistant
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for the task-averaged parent probe on the truth domain at the assistant turn; drawn as the horizontal dashed reference line in the per-turn appendix figure. Value carried over as a hard-coded parent-run summary in the producer (see headline_table.csv parent rows).

claims.name: Per turn parent absolute d harm user
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for the task-averaged parent probe on the harm domain at the user turn; drawn as the horizontal dashed reference line in the per-turn appendix figure. Value carried over as a hard-coded parent-run summary in the producer (see headline_table.csv parent rows).

claims.name: Per turn parent absolute d harm assistant
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d for the task-averaged parent probe on the harm domain at the assistant turn; drawn as the horizontal dashed reference line in the per-turn appendix figure. Value carried over as a hard-coded parent-run summary in the producer (see headline_table.csv parent rows).

claims.name: Per turn absolute d truth user end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the truth user-turn stimuli for the end-of-turn probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d truth assistant end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the truth assistant-turn stimuli for the end-of-turn probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d truth user model-marker probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the truth user-turn stimuli for the model-marker probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d truth assistant model-marker probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the truth assistant-turn stimuli for the model-marker probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d harm user end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the harm user-turn stimuli for the end-of-turn probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d harm assistant end-of-turn probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the harm assistant-turn stimuli for the end-of-turn probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d harm user model-marker probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the harm user-turn stimuli for the model-marker probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.

claims.name: Per turn absolute d harm assistant model-marker probe
claims.statement: Absolute Cohen's d at the end-of-turn token on the harm assistant-turn stimuli for the model-marker probe. Rendered as a bar in the per-turn appendix figure.
